# signalStrength

**Instance Property**

The signal strength the accessory measured for the access point.

## Declaration

```swift
let signalStrength: Double
```

## Discussion

The Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI) as value between `0.0` (weakest) and `1.0` (strongest).
title: signalStrength
